title: Histological Staining of Fish Gonadal Tissue
author: Jhennifer Gomes Cordeiro
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ygvftw6
materials: Leave in eosin solution for 15 minutes 00:15:00

steps.title: Perform a ventro-longitudinal incision to expose...
steps.instruction: Perform a ventro-longitudinal incision to expose the gonads, Bouin's fixative must be immediately applied on the gonads aiming the prefixation. Then, gonads are removed and immediately placed in the fixative

steps.title: 2Leave gonads overnight in Bouin's fixative for 24h 24:00:00
steps.instruction: 2Leave gonads overnight in Bouin's fixative for 24h 24:00:00

steps.title: After 24h, the fixative solution must...
steps.instruction: After 24h, the fixative solution must be replaced with 70% ethanol, that should be renewed every day until there is no trace of fixative

steps.title: Before dehydration the tissue must be...
steps.instruction: Before dehydration the tissue must be sectioned in the desired shape and fit into the molds

steps.title: Samples need to be placed in...
steps.instruction: Samples need to be placed in glass vials, to which the solutions will be added

steps.title: Transfer the samples to three fast...
steps.instruction: Transfer the samples to three fast changes of 70%, 80%, and 90% ethanol 00:03:00, for each change

steps.title: Leave the samples at 95% ethanol for 40 min
steps.instruction: Leave the samples at 95% ethanol for 40 min. 00:40:00

steps.title: Include samples in 1:1 solution of...
steps.instruction: Include samples in 1:1 solution of 95% alcohol and infiltration resin (Methacrylate glycol) for 40 minutes 00:40:00

steps.title: Leave samples in infiltration resin (methacrylate...
steps.instruction: Leave samples in infiltration resin (methacrylate glycol) "overnight" (or at least 12 hours) 12:00:00

steps.title: Prepare the inclusion resin solution (Methacrylate...
steps.instruction: Prepare the inclusion resin solution (Methacrylate glycol) with the hardener (for each 1.0 mL of resin use 0.07 mL of hardener)

steps.title: Embedding the material
steps.instruction: Embedding the material: place the material on the mold and place the resin + hardener solution on it by completing the mold

steps.title: After the resin polymerizes, leave embedded...
steps.instruction: After the resin polymerizes, leave embedded samples in a drying stove for 24 h 24:00:00

steps.title: Unblock and glue on microtome support...
steps.instruction: Unblock and glue on microtome support stick with epoxy resin glue

steps.title: After the glue has completely dried,...
steps.instruction: After the glue has completely dried, the sample should be taken to the microtome

steps.title: The sample should be sectioned to...
steps.instruction: The sample should be sectioned to the thickness of 3 to 5 μm

steps.title: The cuts should be deposited on properly identified slides
steps.instruction: The cuts should be deposited on properly identified slides

steps.title: The slides should be kept in...
steps.instruction: The slides should be kept in the drying stove for 1 day and then followed for staining procedures. If staining with H&E, follow steps 19-27. If staining with toluidine blue, follow steps 28-33 24:00:00

steps.title: Moisturize cuts in running tap water for 10 minutes 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Moisturize cuts in running tap water for 10 minutes 00:10:00

steps.title: Leave in Harri's hematoxylin solution for 15 minutes 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Leave in Harri's hematoxylin solution for 15 minutes 00:15:00

steps.title: 1Wash in running tap water for 10 minutes 00:10:00
steps.instruction: 1Wash in running tap water for 10 minutes 00:10:00

steps.title: Dehydrate in 90% alcohol with fast...
steps.instruction: Dehydrate in 90% alcohol with fast change (if eosin is alcoholic) 00:03:00

steps.title: Rinse well under running water
steps.instruction: Rinse well under running water

steps.title: Transfer the samples to three fast...
steps.instruction: Transfer the samples to three fast changes of 70%, 80%, and 95% ethanol, followed by fast passes in absolute ethanol, and two changes of xylene (3 min for each station) for clearing before coverslipping 00:03:00, for each change

steps.title: Transfer the sample to a third change of xylene 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Transfer the sample to a third change of xylene 00:03:00

steps.title: Mount and coverslip in Permount (xylene-based mounting medium)
steps.instruction: Mount and coverslip in Permount (xylene-based mounting medium)

steps.title: Moisturize cuts in running water for 10 minutes 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Moisturize cuts in running water for 10 minutes 00:10:00

steps.title: Leave in toluidine blue solution for 15 minutes 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Leave in toluidine blue solution for 15 minutes 00:15:00

steps.title: Wash in running water for 10 minutes 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Wash in running water for 10 minutes 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer the samples to three fast...
steps.instruction: Transfer the samples to three fast passes of 70%, 80%, and 95% ethanol, followed by fast passes in absolute ethanol, and two changes of xylene (3 min for each station) for clearing before coverslipping 00:03:00, for each change

steps.title: Transfer the sample to a third change of xylene 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Transfer the sample to a third change of xylene 00:03:00

steps.title: Mount and coverslip in Permount (xylene-based mounting medium)
steps.instruction: Mount and coverslip in Permount (xylene-based mounting medium)

steps.title: Check slides on the microscope and take photographs as needed
steps.instruction: Check slides on the microscope and take photographs as needed. Example slides: Immature female Astyanax bimaculatus gonads Initial gonadal development in male Astyanax bimaculatus
